findings.title: langchain-core 0.3.83 has vulnerability CVE-2026-26013
findings.detail: ## Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in ChatOpenAI Image Token Counting  ### Summary The `ChatOpenAI.get_num_tokens_from_messages()` method fetches arbitrary `image_url` values without validation when computing token counts for vision-enabled models. This allows attackers to trigger Server-Side Req. Fix available: 1.2.11
findings.fix_prompt: Update langchain-core from 0.3.83 to 1.2.11 in requirements.txt to fix CVE-2026-26013. Then run: pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m pipeline.run --slot morning --dry-run

findings.title: pygments 2.19.2 has vulnerability CVE-2026-4539
findings.detail: A security flaw has been discovered in pygments up to 2.19.2. The impacted element is the function AdlLexer of the file pygments/lexers/archetype.py. The manipulation results in inefficient regular expression complexity. The attack is only possible with local access. The exploit has been released to. Fix available: no fix available
findings.fix_prompt: Update pygments from 2.19.2 to no fix available in requirements.txt to fix CVE-2026-4539. Then run: pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m pipeline.run --slot morning --dry-run

findings.title: diskcache 5.6.3 has vulnerability CVE-2025-69872
findings.detail: DiskCache (python-diskcache) through 5.6.3 uses Python pickle for serialization by default. An attacker with write access to the cache directory can achieve arbitrary code execution when a victim application reads from the cache.. Fix available: no fix available
findings.fix_prompt: Update diskcache from 5.6.3 to no fix available in requirements.txt to fix CVE-2025-69872. Then run: pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m pipeline.run --slot morning --dry-run

findings.title: Missing timeout-minutes in fix-articles.yml job 'fix'
findings.detail: Without a timeout, a hung workflow can consume Actions minutes indefinitely.

findings.title: '*.pem' not in .gitignore
findings.detail: SSL/TLS private keys could be accidentally committed.
findings.fix_prompt: Add '*.pem' to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit of ssl/tls private keys.

findings.title: '*.key' not in .gitignore
findings.detail: Private key files could be accidentally committed.
findings.fix_prompt: Add '*.key' to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit of private key files.

findings.title: 'credentials.json' not in .gitignore
findings.detail: Google Cloud credentials could be accidentally committed.
findings.fix_prompt: Add 'credentials.json' to .gitignore to prevent accidental commit of google cloud credentials.
